entries.title: Judge approves a $1.5B Anthropic settlement over pirated books used to train the Claude chatbot
entries.description: A federal judge has approved a $1.5 billion copyright settlement in which artificial intelligence company Anthropic will pay thousands of authors about $3,000 per book after using pirated copies of their works to train its Claude chatbot.

entries.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
entries.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.

entries.title: 2 married couples from Honduras were among 5 adults who drowned in an Ohio river

A second Honduran couple and an adult friend joined them.

entries.title: PCB makes padel mandatory for Pakistan cricketers at National Cricket Academy
entries.description: The Pakistan Cricket Board has made padel a mandatory part of training at the National Cricket Academy, with players required to play 40-minute sessions every alternate day.
